TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Hashim_Thaçi, title = Hashim_Thaçi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hashim_Thaçi} }

S.FORM: = Hashim Thaçi = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 4 jiyax 24 ka Hashim Thaçi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Kosovo ta sayang o kiya ka Hashim Thaçi, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 4 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Hasimi Taci = Hasim Taci (Kari Albania: Hashim Thaçi, kari Serbia: Hašim Tači, kngkawas 1968 idas 4 diyax 24－), Kosovo seyjicya, brah soto Kosovo, kiya uri u ntumal brah Yugoslavia Kosovo Dukuricu Undo niya. Kiya ka Kosovo dukuricu na Bukung Kosovo Mincu Tang mi sediq Albania dmudul na brah Kosovo Heytay Pnltadan mpdudul niya. Hasim Taci u mniq kngkkawas 1990 pnrdingan u mnuyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Prishtina cida, kiya ka hantay Serbia Congyang Seyhu na cicin laqi muyas. Hasim Taci u mniq kngkawas 1993 tumal mniq Switzerland Zuric na Kosovo llutuc Albania seyji undo, kiya mi pssli Kosovo Hedytay Pnltadan, dmudul spuda biyax mcbu meysa dukuricu Kosovo. Bukuy daw ini dhuq 1 kngkawas ka kcka diyax wada qmlahang tuhunac Serbia hbaraw sediq Albania ka mnou Sng 1/4 dxral niya nniqan. Kngkawas 1997 idas 7, Prishtina cida, Prishtina (Sotu Kosovo saya) tihwang hoying ini dhuq muda pcahu Hasim Taci niqan spngan pnchuwan 10 knkawas, tnyuwan cumi ka 'Muda Dmudul Smicu Cuyi', kiya daw spuda Serbia ka tnpusu Tuhunac Ryeynmong heytay mi keysacu muru pnrngawan knkana lnlingay qnlhangan qm raq Hasim Taci. Babaw niya daw Hasim Taci dmudul Kosowo Heytay Pnltada tnumal kngkawas 1999 na Mccbu Kosovo. Mnhdu mccbu daw UN u snkaul tpaytwan drunanmlahang Kosovo, Hasim Taci daw wada psdhu phiyu Kosovo Mincu Tang. Pnuda mccbu mi wada knbsyaqan kngkawas muda mbiyax muda meysa daw, Hasim Taci na mnKosovo seyhu pa hiti balay daw wada mniq kngkawas 2008 idas 2 diyax 17 mdhu balay pkla kari ptalax Serbia dukuricu, dukuricu dhuq saya wada srwanan knkana qnlhangan Omong mi ssiyaw qnlhangan Albania ka smruwa uri. Kngkawas 2007 Kosowo Gikay seyngkyo (2007年科索沃議會選舉) Mniq kngkawas 2007 idas 11 diyax 17 muda kcka Kngkawas 2007 Kosovo Gikay Seyngkyo cida, wada mangal 35% hyo niya ka hantay Tang Kosovo Mincu Tang dndulan dmudul Hasim Taci, smatang musa mniq gikay tu1 knbeyhing Tang, kiya mi ccngtang Kosovo Mincu Ryeynmong u wana balay 22% ka mnnangal dha hyo. Hasim Taci qulung balay mptuhuy Kosovo Mincu Ryeynmong mpsupu muda pssli ryeynho seyhu, kiya mi Hasim Taci u muda mpcongri nbabaw niya ka hiya. Kiya mi mtbiyax balay dukuricu ka Hasim Taci u wada pusa kari, qulung phyuwan congri ka hiya pa, nasi Amirika, Russia mi O Co Ryeymong ka nmdudul uuda Kosovo pprngawan u ini dhqi psbalay, hiya u mpniq nhdanan diyax idas 12 diyax 10 daw, kasi uuda pkla kari dukuricu. Kngkawas 2008 idas 1 diyax 8, Hasim Taci pa balay bay muda tumal pnsung seyngkyo Kosovo Congri. Hasim Taci u 85 hyo mi 22 hyo wada mbiyax ka Hasim Taci, wada mbiyax mangal Kosovo burah Congri ka Hasim Taci, idas 1 diyax 9, Hasim Taci balay bay muda qmpah Congri Kosovo. Pkla kari dukuricu Mniq diyax tndxral hiya kngkawas 2008 idas 2 diyax 17 babaw cka hidaw 3 ji, Hasim Taci u mniq Kosovo Gikay dmudul kcka tukubeycu kaygi cida Kari Dukuricu Kosovo". Pnkla kari niyi u pkla Kosovo ka 'Mincu, Mbabaw Dxral, Kiya mi Knou Kluwanan Minjoku' na qnlhangan, kiya mi muda smdhu kari kasi ka muda knkana tblayaq smmalu phiyu malu pnluban tuhuy ssiyaw qnlhangan Serbia uri, muda snrnu Serbia u 'Mnrbuq Mi Kndux Ka Rikisi, Qqpahan Smbari, Ppwaluk Syakay' kiya u musa mbiyax balay lmutuc pkrana pnluban dha niyi. Babaw niya daw Gikay u muda pyawcwey, babaw cka hidaw 3ji 49pung ka wada muda "Pnkla Kari Dukuricu Kosovo"; hiti dawmniq 3ji 53pung knkana kwohuy giying u uka pnrngawan wada mnhdu psdhuq matas "Pnkla Kari Dukuricu Kosovo". Hasim Taci u u wada nanaq mdhu balay babaw dukuricu Kosovo daw mwaya balay Congri Kosovo. Kngkawas 2008 idas 6 diyax 6, 1 cuko dmuwi puniq meycu cnbu Prishtina Sosyang kwanti, smatang phuqil Hasim Taci mi ini pndungus. Kngkawas 2011 idas 2 diyax 22, Hasim Taci u wada mbiyax mangal Congri Kosovo dungan. Kngkawas 2016 idas 4 diyax 7 Hasim Taci pa wada psdhuwan phiyu Soto Kosovo. Kngkawas 2020 idas 6 diyax 24, congpu u wa mniq Netherlands Hague na Kwoci Tukubeycu Pankongs pkla kari kokosyo dHasim Keysakuwan Taci mi tnhiqan niya, Kwoci Tukubeycu Keysakuwan Pankongs u tmiyu dsediq niyi pa mniq kngkawas 1998 dhuq 1999 iyax cida snquri Serbia joku, sediq Romu, Kosovo llutuc Albania seyji ini pntna qnita niya u muda mqnaqah cumi mccbu mi cumi smliq pnwaya sediq, wada muda dalih 100ka ndanan dha pphuqil sediq. Idas 11 diyax 5, Hasim Taci u malix qpahun niya Soto Kosovo.
S.PHON: = ħasħim tħa*i = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ħasħim tħa*i ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan koso*o ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħasħim tħa*i, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. = ħasimi taʦi = ħasim taʦi (kaɾi albania: ħasħim tħa*i, kaɾi səɾbia: ħa*im ta*i, kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ***), koso*o səɟiʦja, bɾaħ soto koso*o, kija uɾi u ntumal bɾaħ jugosla*ia koso*o dukuɾiʦu undo nija. kija ka koso*o dukuɾiʦu na bukuŋ koso*o minʦu taŋ mi sədiq albania dmudul na bɾaħ koso*o ħətaj pnltadan mpdudul nija. ħasim taʦi u mniq kŋkkawas **** pnɾdiŋan u mnujas pjasan tubəħiŋ pɾisħtina ʦida, kija ka ħantaj səɾbia ʦoŋjaŋ səħu na ʦiʦin laqi mujas. ħasim taʦi u mniq kŋkawas **** tumal mniq swit*əɾland *uɾiʦ na koso*o llutuʦ albania səɟi undo, kija mi pssli koso*o ħədjtaj pnltadan, dmudul spuda bijax mʦbu məsa dukuɾiʦu koso*o. bukuj daw ini dħuq * kŋkawas ka kʦka dijax wada qmlaħaŋ tuħunaʦ səɾbia ħbaɾaw sədiq albania ka mnou sŋ */* dxɾal nija nniqan. kŋkawas **** idas *, pɾisħtina ʦida, pɾisħtina (sotu koso*o saja) tiħwaŋ ħojiŋ ini dħuq muda pʦaħu ħasim taʦi niqan spŋan pnʦħuwan ** knkawas, tnjuwan ʦumi ka 'muda dmudul smiʦu ʦuji', kija daw spuda səɾbia ka tnpusu tuħunaʦ ɾjənmoŋ ħətaj mi kəsaʦu muɾu pnɾŋawan knkana lnliŋaj qnlħaŋan qm ɾaq ħasim taʦi. babaw nija daw ħasim taʦi dmudul kosowo ħətaj pnltada tnumal kŋkawas **** na mʦʦbu koso*o. mnħdu mʦʦbu daw un u snkaul tpajtwan dɾunanmlaħaŋ koso*o, ħasim taʦi daw wada psdħu pħiju koso*o minʦu taŋ. pnuda mʦʦbu mi wada knbsjaqan kŋkawas muda mbijax muda məsa daw, ħasim taʦi na mnkoso*o səħu pa ħiti balaj daw wada mniq kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** mdħu balaj pkla kaɾi ptalax səɾbia dukuɾiʦu, dukuɾiʦu dħuq saja wada sɾwanan knkana qnlħaŋan omoŋ mi ssijaw qnlħaŋan albania ka smɾuwa uɾi. kŋkawas **** kosowo gikaj səŋkjo (************) mniq kŋkawas **** idas ** dijax ** muda kʦka kŋkawas **** koso*o gikaj səŋkjo ʦida, wada maŋal **% ħjo nija ka ħantaj taŋ koso*o minʦu taŋ dndulan dmudul ħasim taʦi, smataŋ musa mniq gikaj tu* knbəħiŋ taŋ, kija mi ʦʦŋtaŋ koso*o minʦu ɾjənmoŋ u wana balaj **% ka mnnaŋal dħa ħjo. ħasim taʦi quluŋ balaj mptuħuj koso*o minʦu ɾjənmoŋ mpsupu muda pssli ɾjənħo səħu, kija mi ħasim taʦi u muda mpʦoŋɾi nbabaw nija ka ħija. kija mi mtbijax balaj dukuɾiʦu ka ħasim taʦi u wada pusa kaɾi, quluŋ pħjuwan ʦoŋɾi ka ħija pa, nasi amiɾika, ɾussia mi o ʦo ɾjəmoŋ ka nmdudul uuda koso*o ppɾŋawan u ini dħqi psbalaj, ħija u mpniq nħdanan dijax idas ** dijax ** daw, kasi uuda pkla kaɾi dukuɾiʦu. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *, ħasim taʦi pa balaj baj muda tumal pnsuŋ səŋkjo koso*o ʦoŋɾi. ħasim taʦi u ** ħjo mi ** ħjo wada mbijax ka ħasim taʦi, wada mbijax maŋal koso*o buɾaħ ʦoŋɾi ka ħasim taʦi, idas * dijax *, ħasim taʦi balaj baj muda qmpaħ ʦoŋɾi koso*o. pkla kaɾi dukuɾiʦu mniq dijax tndxɾal ħija kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** babaw ʦka ħidaw * ɟi, ħasim taʦi u mniq koso*o gikaj dmudul kʦka tukubəʦu kajgi ʦida kaɾi dukuɾiʦu koso*o". pnkla kaɾi niji u pkla koso*o ka 'minʦu, mbabaw dxɾal, kija mi knou kluwanan minɟoku' na qnlħaŋan, kija mi muda smdħu kaɾi kasi ka muda knkana tblajaq smmalu pħiju malu pnluban tuħuj ssijaw qnlħaŋan səɾbia uɾi, muda snɾnu səɾbia u 'mnɾbuq mi kndux ka ɾikisi, qqpaħan smbaɾi, ppwaluk sjakaj' kija u musa mbijax balaj lmutuʦ pkɾana pnluban dħa niji. babaw nija daw gikaj u muda pjawʦwə, babaw ʦka ħidaw *ɟi **puŋ ka wada muda "pnkla kaɾi dukuɾiʦu koso*o"; ħiti dawmniq *ɟi **puŋ knkana kwoħuj gijiŋ u uka pnɾŋawan wada mnħdu psdħuq matas "pnkla kaɾi dukuɾiʦu koso*o". ħasim taʦi u u wada nanaq mdħu balaj babaw dukuɾiʦu koso*o daw mwaja balaj ʦoŋɾi koso*o. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *, * ʦuko dmuwi puniq məʦu ʦnbu pɾisħtina sosjaŋ kwanti, smataŋ pħuqil ħasim taʦi mi ini pnduŋus. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **, ħasim taʦi u wada mbijax maŋal ʦoŋɾi koso*o duŋan. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax * ħasim taʦi pa wada psdħuwan pħiju soto koso*o. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **, ʦoŋpu u wa mniq nətħəɾlands ħaguə na kwoʦi tukubəʦu pankoŋs pkla kaɾi kokosjo dħasim kəsakuwan taʦi mi tnħiqan nija, kwoʦi tukubəʦu kəsakuwan pankoŋs u tmiju dsədiq niji pa mniq kŋkawas **** dħuq **** ijax ʦida snquɾi səɾbia ɟoku, sədiq ɾomu, koso*o llutuʦ albania səɟi ini pntna qnita nija u muda mqnaqaħ ʦumi mʦʦbu mi ʦumi smliq pnwaja sədiq, wada muda daliħ ***ka ndanan dħa ppħuqil sədiq. idas ** dijax *, ħasim taʦi u malix qpaħun nija soto koso*o.
S.FORM: = Hashim Thaçi = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 4 jiyax 24 ka Hashim Thaçi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Kosovo ta sayang o kiya ka Hashim Thaçi, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 4 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Hasimi Taci = Hasim Taci (Kari Albania: Hashim Thaçi, kari Serbia: Hašim Tači, kngkawas 1968 idas 4 diyax 24－), Kosovo seyjicya, brah soto Kosovo, kiya uri u ntumal brah Yugoslavia Kosovo Dukuricu Undo niya. Kiya ka Kosovo dukuricu na Bukung Kosovo Mincu Tang mi sediq Albania dmudul na brah Kosovo Heytay Pnltadan mpdudul niya. Hasim Taci u mniq kngkkawas 1990 pnrdingan u mnuyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Prishtina cida, kiya ka hantay Serbia Congyang Seyhu na cicin laqi muyas. Hasim Taci u mniq kngkawas 1993 tumal mniq Switzerland Zuric na Kosovo llutuc Albania seyji undo, kiya mi pssli Kosovo Hedytay Pnltadan, dmudul spuda biyax mcbu meysa dukuricu Kosovo. Bukuy daw ini dhuq 1 kngkawas ka kcka diyax wada qmlahang tuhunac Serbia hbaraw sediq Albania ka mnou Sng 1/4 dxral niya nniqan. Kngkawas 1997 idas 7, Prishtina cida, Prishtina (Sotu Kosovo saya) tihwang hoying ini dhuq muda pcahu Hasim Taci niqan spngan pnchuwan 10 knkawas, tnyuwan cumi ka 'Muda Dmudul Smicu Cuyi', kiya daw spuda Serbia ka tnpusu Tuhunac Ryeynmong heytay mi keysacu muru pnrngawan knkana lnlingay qnlhangan qm raq Hasim Taci. Babaw niya daw Hasim Taci dmudul Kosowo Heytay Pnltada tnumal kngkawas 1999 na Mccbu Kosovo. Mnhdu mccbu daw UN u snkaul tpaytwan drunanmlahang Kosovo, Hasim Taci daw wada psdhu phiyu Kosovo Mincu Tang. Pnuda mccbu mi wada knbsyaqan kngkawas muda mbiyax muda meysa daw, Hasim Taci na mnKosovo seyhu pa hiti balay daw wada mniq kngkawas 2008 idas 2 diyax 17 mdhu balay pkla kari ptalax Serbia dukuricu, dukuricu dhuq saya wada srwanan knkana qnlhangan Omong mi ssiyaw qnlhangan Albania ka smruwa uri. Kngkawas 2007 Kosowo Gikay seyngkyo (2007年科索沃議會選舉) Mniq kngkawas 2007 idas 11 diyax 17 muda kcka Kngkawas 2007 Kosovo Gikay Seyngkyo cida, wada mangal 35% hyo niya ka hantay Tang Kosovo Mincu Tang dndulan dmudul Hasim Taci, smatang musa mniq gikay tu1 knbeyhing Tang, kiya mi ccngtang Kosovo Mincu Ryeynmong u wana balay 22% ka mnnangal dha hyo. Hasim Taci qulung balay mptuhuy Kosovo Mincu Ryeynmong mpsupu muda pssli ryeynho seyhu, kiya mi Hasim Taci u muda mpcongri nbabaw niya ka hiya. Kiya mi mtbiyax balay dukuricu ka Hasim Taci u wada pusa kari, qulung phyuwan congri ka hiya pa, nasi Amirika, Russia mi O Co Ryeymong ka nmdudul uuda Kosovo pprngawan u ini dhqi psbalay, hiya u mpniq nhdanan diyax idas 12 diyax 10 daw, kasi uuda pkla kari dukuricu. Kngkawas 2008 idas 1 diyax 8, Hasim Taci pa balay bay muda tumal pnsung seyngkyo Kosovo Congri. Hasim Taci u 85 hyo mi 22 hyo wada mbiyax ka Hasim Taci, wada mbiyax mangal Kosovo burah Congri ka Hasim Taci, idas 1 diyax 9, Hasim Taci balay bay muda qmpah Congri Kosovo. Pkla kari dukuricu Mniq diyax tndxral hiya kngkawas 2008 idas 2 diyax 17 babaw cka hidaw 3 ji, Hasim Taci u mniq Kosovo Gikay dmudul kcka tukubeycu kaygi cida Kari Dukuricu Kosovo". Pnkla kari niyi u pkla Kosovo ka 'Mincu, Mbabaw Dxral, Kiya mi Knou Kluwanan Minjoku' na qnlhangan, kiya mi muda smdhu kari kasi ka muda knkana tblayaq smmalu phiyu malu pnluban tuhuy ssiyaw qnlhangan Serbia uri, muda snrnu Serbia u 'Mnrbuq Mi Kndux Ka Rikisi, Qqpahan Smbari, Ppwaluk Syakay' kiya u musa mbiyax balay lmutuc pkrana pnluban dha niyi. Babaw niya daw Gikay u muda pyawcwey, babaw cka hidaw 3ji 49pung ka wada muda "Pnkla Kari Dukuricu Kosovo"; hiti dawmniq 3ji 53pung knkana kwohuy giying u uka pnrngawan wada mnhdu psdhuq matas "Pnkla Kari Dukuricu Kosovo". Hasim Taci u u wada nanaq mdhu balay babaw dukuricu Kosovo daw mwaya balay Congri Kosovo. Kngkawas 2008 idas 6 diyax 6, 1 cuko dmuwi puniq meycu cnbu Prishtina Sosyang kwanti, smatang phuqil Hasim Taci mi ini pndungus. Kngkawas 2011 idas 2 diyax 22, Hasim Taci u wada mbiyax mangal Congri Kosovo dungan. Kngkawas 2016 idas 4 diyax 7 Hasim Taci pa wada psdhuwan phiyu Soto Kosovo. Kngkawas 2020 idas 6 diyax 24, congpu u wa mniq Netherlands Hague na Kwoci Tukubeycu Pankongs pkla kari kokosyo dHasim Keysakuwan Taci mi tnhiqan niya, Kwoci Tukubeycu Keysakuwan Pankongs u tmiyu dsediq niyi pa mniq kngkawas 1998 dhuq 1999 iyax cida snquri Serbia joku, sediq Romu, Kosovo llutuc Albania seyji ini pntna qnita niya u muda mqnaqah cumi mccbu mi cumi smliq pnwaya sediq, wada muda dalih 100ka ndanan dha pphuqil sediq. Idas 11 diyax 5, Hasim Taci u malix qpahun niya Soto Kosovo.

klwaan. = ħasimi taʦi = ħasim taʦi (kaɾi albania: ħasħim tħa*i, kaɾi səɾbia: ħa*im ta*i, kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ***), koso*o səɟiʦja, bɾaħ soto koso*o, kija uɾi u ntumal bɾaħ jugosla*ia koso*o dukuɾiʦu undo nija. kija ka koso*o dukuɾiʦu na bukuŋ koso*o minʦu taŋ mi sədiq albania dmudul na bɾaħ koso*o ħətaj pnltadan mpdudul nija. ħasim taʦi u mniq kŋkkawas **** pnɾdiŋan u mnujas pjasan tubəħiŋ pɾisħtina ʦida, kija ka ħantaj səɾbia ʦoŋjaŋ səħu na ʦiʦin laqi mujas. ħasim taʦi u mniq kŋkawas **** tumal mniq swit*əɾland *uɾiʦ na koso*o llutuʦ albania səɟi undo, kija mi pssli koso*o ħədjtaj pnltadan, dmudul spuda bijax mʦbu məsa dukuɾiʦu koso*o. bukuj daw ini dħuq * kŋkawas ka kʦka dijax wada qmlaħaŋ tuħunaʦ səɾbia ħbaɾaw sədiq albania ka mnou sŋ */* dxɾal nija nniqan. kŋkawas **** idas *, pɾisħtina ʦida, pɾisħtina (sotu koso*o saja) tiħwaŋ ħojiŋ ini dħuq muda pʦaħu ħasim taʦi niqan spŋan pnʦħuwan ** knkawas, tnjuwan ʦumi ka 'muda dmudul smiʦu ʦuji', kija daw spuda səɾbia ka tnpusu tuħunaʦ ɾjənmoŋ ħətaj mi kəsaʦu muɾu pnɾŋawan knkana lnliŋaj qnlħaŋan qm ɾaq ħasim taʦi. babaw nija daw ħasim taʦi dmudul kosowo ħətaj pnltada tnumal kŋkawas **** na mʦʦbu koso*o. mnħdu mʦʦbu daw un u snkaul tpajtwan dɾunanmlaħaŋ koso*o, ħasim taʦi daw wada psdħu pħiju koso*o minʦu taŋ. pnuda mʦʦbu mi wada knbsjaqan kŋkawas muda mbijax muda məsa daw, ħasim taʦi na mnkoso*o səħu pa ħiti balaj daw wada mniq kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** mdħu balaj pkla kaɾi ptalax səɾbia dukuɾiʦu, dukuɾiʦu dħuq saja wada sɾwanan knkana qnlħaŋan omoŋ mi ssijaw qnlħaŋan albania ka smɾuwa uɾi. kŋkawas **** kosowo gikaj səŋkjo (************) mniq kŋkawas **** idas ** dijax ** muda kʦka kŋkawas **** koso*o gikaj səŋkjo ʦida, wada maŋal **% ħjo nija ka ħantaj taŋ koso*o minʦu taŋ dndulan dmudul ħasim taʦi, smataŋ musa mniq gikaj tu* knbəħiŋ taŋ, kija mi ʦʦŋtaŋ koso*o minʦu ɾjənmoŋ u wana balaj **% ka mnnaŋal dħa ħjo. ħasim taʦi quluŋ balaj mptuħuj koso*o minʦu ɾjənmoŋ mpsupu muda pssli ɾjənħo səħu, kija mi ħasim taʦi u muda mpʦoŋɾi nbabaw nija ka ħija. kija mi mtbijax balaj dukuɾiʦu ka ħasim taʦi u wada pusa kaɾi, quluŋ pħjuwan ʦoŋɾi ka ħija pa, nasi amiɾika, ɾussia mi o ʦo ɾjəmoŋ ka nmdudul uuda koso*o ppɾŋawan u ini dħqi psbalaj, ħija u mpniq nħdanan dijax idas ** dijax ** daw, kasi uuda pkla kaɾi dukuɾiʦu. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *, ħasim taʦi pa balaj baj muda tumal pnsuŋ səŋkjo koso*o ʦoŋɾi. ħasim taʦi u ** ħjo mi ** ħjo wada mbijax ka ħasim taʦi, wada mbijax maŋal koso*o buɾaħ ʦoŋɾi ka ħasim taʦi, idas * dijax *, ħasim taʦi balaj baj muda qmpaħ ʦoŋɾi koso*o. pkla kaɾi dukuɾiʦu mniq dijax tndxɾal ħija kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** babaw ʦka ħidaw * ɟi, ħasim taʦi u mniq koso*o gikaj dmudul kʦka tukubəʦu kajgi ʦida kaɾi dukuɾiʦu koso*o". pnkla kaɾi niji u pkla koso*o ka 'minʦu, mbabaw dxɾal, kija mi knou kluwanan minɟoku' na qnlħaŋan, kija mi muda smdħu kaɾi kasi ka muda knkana tblajaq smmalu pħiju malu pnluban tuħuj ssijaw qnlħaŋan səɾbia uɾi, muda snɾnu səɾbia u 'mnɾbuq mi kndux ka ɾikisi, qqpaħan smbaɾi, ppwaluk sjakaj' kija u musa mbijax balaj lmutuʦ pkɾana pnluban dħa niji. babaw nija daw gikaj u muda pjawʦwə, babaw ʦka ħidaw *ɟi **puŋ ka wada muda "pnkla kaɾi dukuɾiʦu koso*o"; ħiti dawmniq *ɟi **puŋ knkana kwoħuj gijiŋ u uka pnɾŋawan wada mnħdu psdħuq matas "pnkla kaɾi dukuɾiʦu koso*o". ħasim taʦi u u wada nanaq mdħu balaj babaw dukuɾiʦu koso*o daw mwaja balaj ʦoŋɾi koso*o. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *, * ʦuko dmuwi puniq məʦu ʦnbu pɾisħtina sosjaŋ kwanti, smataŋ pħuqil ħasim taʦi mi ini pnduŋus. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **, ħasim taʦi u wada mbijax maŋal ʦoŋɾi koso*o duŋan. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax * ħasim taʦi pa wada psdħuwan pħiju soto koso*o. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **, ʦoŋpu u wa mniq nətħəɾlands ħaguə na kwoʦi tukubəʦu pankoŋs pkla kaɾi kokosjo dħasim kəsakuwan taʦi mi tnħiqan nija, kwoʦi tukubəʦu kəsakuwan pankoŋs u tmiju dsədiq niji pa mniq kŋkawas **** dħuq **** ijax ʦida snquɾi səɾbia ɟoku, sədiq ɾomu, koso*o llutuʦ albania səɟi ini pntna qnita nija u muda mqnaqaħ ʦumi mʦʦbu mi ʦumi smliq pnwaja sədiq, wada muda daliħ ***ka ndanan dħa ppħuqil sədiq. idas ** dijax *, ħasim taʦi u malix qpaħun nija soto koso*o.
